error: quantile_tdigest_weighted just support numeric type, but got 'Null'

ast: quantile_tdigest_weighted(0.8)(x_null, b)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                            |

| b      | Column(UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]))                                                    |

| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([1, 2]), validity: [0b______11] }              |

error: weight just support unsigned integer type, but got 'Number(Int64)'
